title: we loved each other and then we didn't
content:
we loved each other and then we didn't

…

She kissed me like she was trying to kill me

More people need to be afraid of being annoying.

Beauty in the daily distraction

…

--Let me finally say for the first time what I don't like about her

--Why didn't you say any of this before?

--I don't know. I didn't want to know.

…

Those phone calls annoyed me; even then, I was aware I would miss them one day. This realization didn't inhibit my poor attitude.

…

The wedding guest lists gave each our names a separate line; not long before, our names shared a line in any list inviting guests.

...

I think about suicide a lot but never put a plan into place. When I told my ex that she literally had no response. It never occurred to her that someone might consider killing themself and it never occurred to me that someone never considered it.
context: From document: we loved each other and then we didn't — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
